tasks.title: Stabilize Flow/Mem/Kernel ASDL shape
tasks.detail: Curate the newly added MoonFlow/MoonMem/MoonKernel schemas so they encode the intended tower: MoonCode residual semantics; MoonFlow code-CFG facts with edge roles; MoonMem code-level memory/provenance facts and proofs; MoonKernel backend-neutral executable kernel sites, streams, cores, and schedules. Keep MoonKernel independent from MoonVec. Verify schema smoke tests.
notes: Completed initial schema curation: added Flow edge roles and bounds, Mem code contract proofs, KernelSite, KernelAssumption, target-neutral KernelLaneShape, explicit atomic/volatile/trap rejects. Schema smoke tests pass.

tasks.title: Add schema constructor tests for Flow/Mem/Kernel
tasks.detail: Extend schema tests to instantiate representative MoonFlow, MoonMem, and MoonKernel nodes, including a counted loop, memory access fact, kernel stream, kernel site, and planned scalar/vector schedules.

tasks.title: Extract code-level contract facts
tasks.detail: Translate Tree.ContractFact values into MoonCode.CodeContractFactSet keyed by CodeFuncId/CodeValueId so MoonMem no longer depends on MoonTree contracts for proof provenance.

tasks.title: Implement code_flow_facts phase
tasks.detail: Analyze CodeFunc blocks, terminators, block params, and jump arguments to produce MoonFlow.FlowFactSet with edges, loop roles, counted domains, inductions, exits, ranges, and rejection facts.

tasks.title: Implement code_mem_facts phase
tasks.detail: Analyze CodeInstLoad/Store/Atomics, CodePlace and CodeInstPtrOffset/view-derived access patterns to produce MoonMem.MemFactSet. Preserve volatility/atomics/trap semantics and validate consistency against CodeMemoryAccess.

tasks.title: Implement code_kernel_plan phase
tasks.detail: Consume CodeModule, FlowFactSet, MemFactSet, and CodeContractFactSet to produce MoonKernel.KernelModulePlan with explicit rejections for unsupported loops/memory, scalar reductions/maps, pointer-stream schedules, and vector-eligible schedules.

tasks.title: Migrate vector facts onto Kernel tower
tasks.detail: Treat current vec_* modules as prototype material. Move generic loop/memory/reduction/safety concepts to Flow/Mem/Kernel and leave MoonVec for vector-specific lane ops/target facts/lowering only.

tasks.title: Add kernel validators
tasks.detail: Validate Flow/Mem/Kernel facts for referential integrity, deterministic ordering, no contradictions with CodeMemoryAccess, coverage of KernelSite blocks, and explicit handling of atomic/volatile/trapping accesses.

tasks.title: Project Kernel plans to C and Back
tasks.detail: Add kernel_to_c and kernel_to_back projection paths so dumb backends consume canonical kernel forms. Keep code_to_c/code_to_back as residual MoonCode projections for uncovered code.

tasks.title: Integrate fact tower in frontend pipeline
tasks.detail: Update frontend_pipeline to run code_validate -> code_flow_facts -> code_mem_facts -> code_kernel_plan -> kernel_validate before backend projection, with residual Code fallback and observable rejection facts instead of silent pcall fallback.
